ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory (e.g., QFED biomass burning emissions) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of inventory (e.g., OPTIONAL, DEFAULT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inventory */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., v2.5r1, v11-02f) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directories" (
  "directory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory the directory belongs to */,
  "directory_path" TEXT /* Path to the directory (e.g., HEMCO/QFED/v2018-07) */,
  "directory_size" REAL /* Size of the directory in MB */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the directory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory the data type belongs to */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., emissions data, land cover data) */,
  "data_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory the data file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., netCDF, CSV) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the inventory */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory being validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control event */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory being quality controlled */,
  "qc_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control was performed */,
  "qc_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality control result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_format" TEXT /* Format of the visualization (e.g., PNG, SVG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revision_author" TEXT /* Author of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_revisions_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory the data source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata (e.g., title, description) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_tags" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id", "tag_id")
)
